case_title: MARJORIE MIRANDA NISHIMATA VS. MAURIZIO IANTORNO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NISHIMATA, MARJORIE MIRANDA AS TO DEFENDANT IANTORNO, MAURIZIO ,AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS GENERAL PARTNER OF CAFFE SPUNTINO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NISHIMATA, MARJORIE MIRANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IANTORNO, MAURIZIO ,AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS GENERAL PARTNER OF CAFFE SPUNTINO, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $6,940.48 PRINCIPAL, $297.13 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,462.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
